questionHtml: Calculate the cost to the government of San Marcus of providing this subsidy to domestic cotton producers.
markschemeHtml:
8 × 75 (× 1000)

Any valid working is sufficient for [1].

= $600 000

An answer of 600 000 or $600 000 (without working) is sufficient for [1].

OFR may apply.
